habitat: Open woodland; cultivation; arid thornscrub; moist savanna; gardens; and forest edge
story: In the diverse world of birds, the Variable Sunbird (Cinnyris venustus) stands out. This species, part of the Nectariniidae family, is a resident of Open woodland; cultivation; arid thornscrub; moist savanna; gardens; and forest edge. Its IUCN Red List status is Least Concern (LC), which serves as a call to action for habitat preservation. The Variable Sunbird is more than just a bird; it is a symbol of the rich biodiversity that we must protect. Through this poster, we hope to foster a greater understanding and appreciation for the Variable Sunbird and its role in the ecosystem.
Every poster is crafted to inspire curiosity about our planet's incredible biodiversity.
